message:
bd-2bzyy: parser SCOSC/SCORC + ED3 + focus events + bracketed paste

Add 5 new Action variants (EraseScrollback, FocusIn, FocusOut,
PasteStart, PasteEnd) and CSI dispatch for:
- CSI s / CSI u (SCOSC/SCORC cursor save/restore with DECSLRM guard)
- CSI 3 J (ED mode 3, erase scrollback)
- CSI I / CSI O (focus in/out)
- CSI 200~ / CSI 201~ (bracketed paste markers)

Includes 11 parser unit tests, 3 conformance fixtures, and
wiring in all test harnesses. Also fixes broken SoftReset handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "scosc_scorc_roundtrip",
+  "description": "SCOSC (CSI s) saves cursor; SCORC (CSI u) restores it after moving",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41421b5b731b5b333b3648581b5b7559",
+  "comment": "Print AB at (0,0)-(0,1), cursor at (0,2). CSI s save. CUP(3;6)=(2,5) print X at (2,5). CSI u restore to (0,2). Print Y at (0,2). Cursor at (0,3).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 3 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 5, "char": "X" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed3_erase_scrollback",
+  "description": "ED mode 3 (CSI 3 J) erases scrollback but leaves display content intact",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243441b5b334a",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD at (0,0)-(0,3). CSI 3 J erases scrollback only — display content unchanged. Cursor stays at (0,4).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
